### **[Partner Mission Proposal Dec](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1MFsHUiyvH9JrVFwYq0xXansnCFSL0OS4y489N9tEv9g/edit?userstoinvite=a.lubbers%40efg.gg&sharingaction=manageaccess&role=writer&gid=1103962293#gid=1103962293)**

### **1\. Top Of the Funnel** 

### **Experiment: Increasing Account Linkage Among Unresponsive Users**

### **Background**

Unresponsive users show consistently low engagement and limited motivation, neither brand propositions nor standard incentives have driven meaningful action so far.

### **Problem Statement**

How can we encourage this user segment to **link their accounts** with **WL** or **Tradeit**?

### **Data Overview**

| Region | Active Players | WL Account Linked | Tradeit Account Linked |
| :---- | ----- | ----- | ----- |
| **Russia** | 450K (23K are premium users) | 355K |  |
| **Rest of the World** *(US, CA, RU, BY, DZ, BH, EG, IQ, IL, JO, KW, LB, LY, MR, MA, OM, QA, SA, SD, TN, AE, YE, TH, SG, ID, IN, KR, JP, PH, AU, TW, LK, HK, MN)* | 169K (of which 152K are non-subscribers) | — | 58K |

### **Hypothesis**

Providing premium tokens as free rewards to non-subscribed, unresponsive users will:

* Increase the rate of **account linkages** with WL and Tradeit.  
* Improve **overall engagement** and retention in this low-activity segment.

### **Proposed Solution**

Introduce premium token giveaways targeted at free users to stimulate account linkage and engagement.

Figma: [Figma](https://www.figma.com/design/sSI55E9jrxRoWXmU7HFTHM/Mission-Experiments-2025?node-id=7999-122291&t=tN2w4SQzmdFlAixr-1)

### **Test Setup**

**Winline** 

| Group | Description | Incentive |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| **Control** | No change to current experience | None |
| **Variant 1** | Incentivised users with token rewards | Premium Tokens |
| **Variant 2** | “Drops Case” containing mixed rewards | TBC: Tokens \+ 3,000 FP \+ Cosmetic Item |

**Tradeit**

| Group | Description | Incentive |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| **Control** | No change to current experience | None |
| **Variant 1** | Incentivised users with token rewards | Premium Tokens |
| **Variant 2** | “Drops Case” containing mixed rewards |  |

### **2\. Middle Of the Funnel** 

### **Experiment: Improve the UX of the Mission Chain to increase completion**

### **Background**

Following the initial [proof of concept (POC),](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1d09Xg4LyBmFlCqJf3tHNieqjygInY4prFSyBeFmQlnA/edit?slide=id.g387d6c9aaa6_0_278#slide=id.g387d6c9aaa6_0_278) we validated that the Mission Chain feature has a positive impact on mission completion rates.

In the current POC user experience, when a user completes a mission, they receive a ticket to another mission. However, progressing to the next mission requires the user to manually click and navigate to a new page, introducing unnecessary friction in the flow.

For the next version, we aim to optimize this experience by reducing friction and analysing additional data points to further improve user engagement and conversion rates.

[Figma](https://www.figma.com/design/sSI55E9jrxRoWXmU7HFTHM/Mission-Experiments-2025?node-id=7900-107661&t=AT7h3hjoaUko0r9B-4)

**![][image1]**

### **Test Setup**

We can only consider the segment of users that linked their accounts for this experiment

**Winline** 

| Group | Description |  |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| **Control** | Users will access the second Mission with the “ticket” bonus reward |  |
| **Variant 1** | Users will see Chapters \+ show Rewards  |  |

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>
